name: komeview
description: 動画の再生画面にニコニコのコメントを重ねて表示するデスクトップアプリ
author: kamm (https://github.com/nyumen)

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload
scripts.start: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && electron .
scripts.dev: concurrently "vite" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && electron ."
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --publish never

fileAssociations.name: Niconico Comment XML
fileAssociations.description: ニコニコ動画コメントXML
